privileged_info_summary: The document has 15 subsection headings formatted at outline-level=3 (not the claimed 10), requiring conversion to level=2. It contains 3 red-text paragraphs using the RedDeficiency style with fo:color='#ff0000' that must be changed to black. A manually-typed Table of Contents using text:p paragraphs exists instead of an auto-generated text:table-of-content element. The document has no footer or page numbers. The building and department are real (Howard Office Building at 700 2nd Ave S, Nashville, TN 37210; Metro Nashville Department of General Services), but the inspection content and inspector name are synthetic.
